name: Kiflies by Helen
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg yolks, lemon rind, and sugar until well combined.
2. Gradually add the flour to the mixture and mix until a dough forms.
3. Fold in the butter, sour cream, nuts, and egg whites, mixing until all ingredients are thoroughly blended.
4. Form small balls (about tablespoon size) and refrigerate overnight.
5. Roll out each ball to the size of a saucer.
6. Fill with desired filling ().
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes.
The less handling the dough receives, the flakier the kiflies will be. To prepare the butter mixture, rub it between your hands until it becomes crumbly and well combined with the flour.
